transactions.desc: The Toronto Blue Jays traded RHP Hayden Juenger to the  Athletics.
Santana agreed to a minor-league contract with Atlanta on Saturday, Jeff Passan of ESPN.com reports.
Teng was optioned to Triple-A Sugar Land on Saturday, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.
The A's designated Harris for assignment on Saturday.
The Angels optioned Moore to Triple-A Salt Lake on Saturday.
The Angels reinstated Siri from the paternity list Saturday.
Houston recalled Ullola from Triple-A Sugar Land on Saturday, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.
The Cubs recalled Ferguson from Triple-A Iowa on Saturday, Taylor McGregor of Marquee Sports Network reports.
The Cubs optioned Murray to Triple-A Iowa on Saturday, Taylor McGregor of Marquee Sports Network reports.
The Mariners recalled Simpson from Triple-A Tacoma on Saturday.
The Mariners optioned Hoppe to Triple-A Tacoma on Saturday.
The Orioles reinstated Povich (elbow) from the injured list Saturday and optioned him to Triple-A Norfolk, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
The Orioles designated Nicolas for assignment Saturday, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
The Orioles claimed Keegan off waivers from the Rays on Saturday and optioned him to Double-A Chesapeake, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
The Blue Jays optioned Schneider to Triple-A Buffalo on Saturday.
The Blue Jays recalled Pinango from Triple-A Buffalo on Saturday.
The Blue Jays selected Keys' contract from Triple-A Buffalo on Saturday.
The Royals recalled Cerantola from Triple-A Omaha on Saturday.
The Royals optioned Spence to Triple-A Omaha on Saturday.
The Mets optioned Thornton to Triple-A Syracuse on Saturday.
The Mets reinstated Scott (hip) from the 15-day injured list ahead of his start Saturday against the Phillies.
The White Sox recalled Schweitzer from Triple-A Charlotte on Saturday.
The White Sox optioned Sandlin to Triple-A Charlotte on Saturday.
Santana cleared waivers Friday and was released by the Diamondbacks.
The Marlins released Morel on Friday, Isaac Azout of FishOnFirst.com reports.
Carrasco cleared waivers Friday and elected free agency.
San Francisco designated Ramos for assignment Friday, Shayna Rubin of the San Francisco Chronicle reports.
Atlanta recalled Waldrep from Triple-A Gwinnett on Friday.
Boston recalled Cheng from Triple-A Worcester and he will start at shortstop against the Yankees on Friday, Mac Cerullo of the Boston Herald reports.
The Marlins optioned Norby to Triple-A Jacksonville on Friday.
